ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the organization's name */,
  "interest" REAL /* Interest score of the organization */,
  "influence" REAL /* Influence score of the organization */,
  "grouped" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., donor, NGO) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of operation (e.g., national, international) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Organization's official website */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the organization was founded */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Organization's contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization funding or supporting the project */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of project (e.g., infrastructure, education) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the project (e.g., healthcare, education) */,
  "partners" TEXT /* Partner organizations involved in the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Total funding amount allocated for the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project receiving the funding */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization providing the funding */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., grant, loan) */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date when the funding was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being collaborated on */,
  "org_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first organization in the collaboration */,
  "org_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second organization in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the organization in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., partnership, consortium) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the collaboration */,
  "collab_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_org_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("org_id1") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_org_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("org_id2") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "city" TEXT /* City related to the project */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "section" TEXT /* Name of the section accessed (e.g., projects, organizations) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact assessment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being assessed */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score of the project */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the assessment */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the impact assessment */,
  "evaluation_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_assessments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being evaluated */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metric used */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given for the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization related to the article */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source related to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission related to the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_roles_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)
